MeraLabh.

Disclaimer & Non-Affiliation Notice

Important disclosure regarding MeraLabh's independent status and official government resources.

1. Independent Information Portal

MeraLabh (meralabh.com) is an independent, private educational and informational portal. We are not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with the National Health Authority (NHA), the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (MoHFW), or any Central or State Government department in India.

2. Official Government Resources

The official portal for the Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) is maintained exclusively by the Government of India at pmjay.gov.in.

For official beneficiary status check, card downloads, or hospital listings, citizens should always use the official government portal or contact the 24/7 national helpline at 14555.

3. Accuracy & Educational Purpose

While our team makes every effort to ensure that scheme guidelines, eligibility conditions, and required document lists are accurate and up to date based on publicly released government notifications, government policies may change over time. MeraLabh does not issue Ayushman Cards or guarantee official scheme enrollment.

MeraLabh.

MeraLabh is a public-facing information portal that simplifies Indian government scheme rules to help everyday citizens understand their benefits.

Official Support

Official PM-JAY national helpline operates 24/7 for beneficiary queries:

14555

Disclaimer: MeraLabh is an independent informational website and is not affiliated with the National Health Authority, the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, or any state or central government. The official portal is located at pmjay.gov.in.
